user_intent_summary: Identify routes with unusually high or low anomaly-related metrics for monitoring.

datasets.name: allarmi_raw
datasets.rationale: Dataset contains alarm occurrences and route endpoints. Grouping by departure and arrival airports yields route-level aggregates for anomaly detection on alarm counts.

datasets.name: tipologia_raw
datasets.rationale: Dataset includes flagged travelers and route endpoints. Filtering for allarmati=1 focuses on anomaly-related travelers. Grouping by airports provides route-level metrics for anomaly analysis.
